summary: Produced ios-fabrication-decisions.json with 14 unique refs triaged across all 4 SDK surfaces. Re-ran iOS validator to get fresh drift numbers. All rows have surface_evidence for all 4 platforms, classification, recommended_action, and reasoning.
notes: Key findings: (1) All .shared refs (AmityEventRepository.shared ×19, AmityRoomRepository.shared ×17, AmityPostRepository.shared ×6, AmityClient.shared ×4, AmityFileRepository.shared ×3, AmityStreamRepository.shared ×1) classified TRUE_FABRICATION_NOWHERE — none of these iOS repository classes have static .shared properties; iOS pattern is explicit instantiation via init(). Recommended REWRITE_TO:init(). (2) AmityViewedType.STORY is NAME_DRIFT — SDK has lowercase `case story`; recommended REWRITE_TO:AmityViewedType.story. (3) AmityMentionMapper.metadata, AmityCommunityMembership.QueryFilter/.SearchFilter, AmityPinPlacement.default flagged IOS_EXTRACTOR_BLIND_SPOT — these exist in SDK but validator doesn't walk nested_types or handle backtick cases fully. Flagged for v1.2 work. (4) import AmityLiveVideoBroadcastKit / AmityVideoSDK / AmityUIKit / AmityUIKit4 are IOS_EXTRACTOR_BLIND_SPOT — valid frameworks not in KNOWN_VALID_IMPORTS list. Fix: add to validator's allowlist.
